title: Armstrong Number
code:
<html>
<title>Armstrong Number</title>
<body>
<form method="post">
Enter the Number:
<input type="number" name="number">
<input type="submit" value="Submit">
</form>
<?php
if($_POST) {
$number=$_POST['number'];
$a=$number;
$sum=0;
while($a !=0)
{
$rem=$a%10;
$sum=$sum+($rem*$rem*$rem);
$a=$a/10;
}
if($number==$sum)
{
echo"Yes $number an Armstrong number";
}
else
{
echo("$number is not an Armstrong");
}
}
?>
</body>
</html>
